title: PolicyRecommendation
description: A DOI Policy and Procedure Recommendation (PPR) — a reform recommendation DOI issues to a City agency, tracked through acceptance and implementation. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Policy and Procedure Recommendations (PPR) Portal' dataset (jstn-jaut). This is DOI's one genuinely structured investigative-output twin on Open Data.

agency.description: City agency the recommendation was directed to ('Agency').

agencyReportedStatus.description: Status as reported by the receiving agency ('Agency Reported Status').
